_meta.purpose: Canonical Bolo Boys repertoire — covers + originals with rotation flags. Once complete, 'songs in active rotation not on the 5/31 setlist' becomes a query instead of a head-scratch. Read by the /show-prep skill (Repertoire snapshot). Per DECISIONS.md D-OPEN-3 item 2.
_meta.status_note: SEED — NOT the full repertoire. Only songs verifiable from data/band.json (originals) + data/bolo-song-list-additions.csv (covers in progress) as of 2026-05-28 are here. The bulk of the live set lives in Paul's head + scattered docs and needs backfilling. Until status flips to 'complete', any setlist-vs-repertoire query is partial. Owner of the backfill: Paul.
_meta.source_csv: data/bolo-song-list-additions.csv (migrated in; the CSV can be retired once this file is the source of truth)

_schema_example.title: Song Title
_schema_example.writer: Writer name (originals only; null for covers)
_schema_example.genre: country | folk | reggae | classic-rock | throwback-pop | bluegrass | punk | other
_schema_example.rotation_notes: active = gig-ready & played; learning = being worked up; candidate = on the maybe list, not started; retired = dropped from the set
_schema_example.confidence: high | medium | low | null (band's readiness to play it live)
_schema_example.count_off: e.g. '1-2-3-4' or feel note, or null

links.chords_doc: Google Doc with chords/lyrics, or null

songs.title: Roadrunner
songs.notes: Bolo Boys original (Paul). Punk-inspired Atlanta song. Chords & lyrics doc on file. Lyrics PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/18hzYbxWvYzyXLtgQeei-QO9ZBRKMMhwA/view

songs.title: Glow
songs.notes: Bolo Boys original (Paul). Chords & lyrics doc on file. Lyrics PDF: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VeNnFdFwh3V6wh_qxj3_Le3_KSd0iggD/view

songs.title: Muddy Knees
songs.notes: Bolo Boys original. No tab/doc on file yet — chords & lyrics doc needs to be authored.

songs.title: The Cowboy's Life
songs.notes: Nigel's solo recording (released 2026); Bolo Boys play it live. Western song about a man on the open road. Released on Spotify/Apple/Amazon/Bandcamp.

songs.title: Tennessee Stud
songs.notes: John brings this bluegrass classic into the set (per band.json) — opens the band to new demographics.

songs.title: Boys Don't Cry
songs.notes: From the Side Saddle set additions list (bolo-song-list-additions.csv). Confidence not yet set by band.

songs.title: 21 Questions
songs.notes: From the Side Saddle set additions list. Guitar riff ref: https://tabs.ultimate-guitar.com/tab/50-cent/21-questions-tabs-49597
